# Gabriel Raymondou

> Freelance fullstack developer specializing in web apps, AI integrations, and growth automation. Based in Cannes, France. Available for hire.

## About

Gabriel Raymondou is a fullstack developer and Marketing Software Engineer with experience building scalable acquisition systems, web applications, and custom AI-powered tools. He has co-founded two startups, led technical delivery at an AI automation agency, and works with clients across France and internationally.

## Services

- Web application development (React, Next.js, TypeScript)
- AI integration and automation (LLM APIs, custom pipelines)
- Growth engineering and acquisition systems
- Freelance consulting and project delivery

## Stack

TypeScript, React, Next.js, AWS, Vercel, Generative AI, Claude, HubSpot

## Experience

- **Marketing Software Engineer** — Swile (Jan 2022 – Present): Scalable acquisition systems for a leading French fintech.
- **Co-Founder** — Synergia (Oct 2024 – Jun 2025): AI automation agency based in Dubai. Custom AI solutions for sports, healthcare, and luxury.
- **Freelance Web Developer** — Independent (Jan 2020 – Present): Web apps and growth tools for clients across France and internationally.

## Selected Projects

- **Studiz App**: Gamified quiz app for students (Swift, Firebase, AWS). Live at mystudiz.com.
- **Fliit Bot**: Facebook Messenger chatbot for booking flights and hotels (Chatfuel, Kiwi API, DialogFlow).
- **HeroGrowth**: Social media agency website with 80+ PageSpeed score (Sass, WordPress, Bootstrap).
